# Jamaica Developer Kit

> Open-source toolkit for building Jamaica-focused applications. Provides dual-language (TypeScript/JavaScript + Python) packages covering identity validation, financial calculations, geographic data, education, health, transport, emergency services, and more. Public package publication is still being prepared; the current supported path is using the monorepo from source.

The Jamaica Developer Kit is a public OSS toolkit for software that needs Jamaica-specific rules, data, and validation logic. It includes reusable packages, example apps, and documentation for sectors such as finance, government, education, health, logistics, ecommerce, and civic tech.

## Guide

- [Getting Started](https://jamaica-dev.org/guide/getting-started): Current setup path, planned package names, and first steps
- [Installation](https://jamaica-dev.org/guide/installation): Requirements and source-based setup instructions
- [Quick Start](https://jamaica-dev.org/guide/quick-start): Build your first Jamaica-aware application

## Core Packages

- [jamaica-trn](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/trn): Validate and format Jamaica Taxpayer Registration Numbers (TRN)
- [jamaica-phone](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/phone): Validate and format Jamaican phone numbers
- [jamaica-addresses](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/addresses): Parse informal Jamaican addresses and extract parishes
- [jamaica-constants](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/constants): Country reference data such as timezone, emergency numbers, and symbols

## Finance Packages

- [jamaica-currency](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/currency): JMD formatting, parsing, and GCT helpers
- [jamaica-tax](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/tax): PAYE, NIS, NHT, Education Tax, and payroll calculations
- [jamaica-banks](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/banks): Banking institutions, branches, and SWIFT/BIC data
- [jamaica-gov-fees](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/gov-fees): Government service fee lookups

## Geography Packages

- [jamaica-parishes](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/parishes): All 14 parishes with metadata
- [jamaica-places](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/places): Cities, towns, communities, districts, and villages
- [jamaica-constituencies](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/constituencies): Electoral constituencies and parish mapping
- [jamaica-transport](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/transport): Airports, seaports, vehicle classes, and transport data

## Social Packages

- [jamaica-schools](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/schools): Schools and universities directory
- [jamaica-health](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/health): Hospitals, health centres, and RHAs
- [jamaica-emergency](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/emergency): Police, fire, shelters, and emergency numbers
- [jamaica-holidays](https://jamaica-dev.org/packages/holidays): Public holidays and business-day utilities

## CLI

- [CLI Overview](https://jamaica-dev.org/cli/): Command-line interface in the monorepo; package publication is pending

## Examples

- [Common Patterns](https://jamaica-dev.org/examples/common-patterns): Validation, tax, fee, and office-status workflows
- [React Forms](https://jamaica-dev.org/examples/react-forms): Form handling for TRN, phone, and fee flows
- [Express Middleware](https://jamaica-dev.org/examples/express-middleware): Backend validation and API examples

## Public Status

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/itsanderz/jamaica-dev-kit)
- [Latest GitHub Release](https://github.com/itsanderz/jamaica-dev-kit/releases/latest)
- [Package release tracking](https://github.com/itsanderz/jamaica-dev-kit/issues/2)
